cards.en: IN the morning / IN the afternoon / IN the evening
IN January / IN March / IN December
IN spring / IN summer / IN autumn / IN winter
IN the 21st century / IN the Middle Ages
IN 5 minutes / IN a week / IN two years
IN the end ← но: AT the end = в конце (позиция)
IN time — he did it in record time
IN time ← но: ON time = пунктуально, точно в срок
IN the first week / IN the last month
IN the 1990s / IN the Victorian era
